content:
ADVANCED FORMULATION FOR MEN HEALTH
Tongkat Ali Extract, KSM-66 Ashwagandha Extract & Maca Extract

Tongkat Ali - Malaysia's National Treasure

Tongkat Ali, also known as Eurycoma longifolia Jack, is an herbal medicinal plant found in South East Asia (Malaysia, Vietnam, Java, Sumatra, Thailand). Tongkat Ali has a range of medicinal properties as a general health tonic, including improvement in physical and mental energy levels and overall quality of life. The roots of tongkat ali, often called "Malaysian ginseng", are used as an adaptogen and as a traditional "anti-aging" remedy to help older individuals adapt to the reduced energy, mood, and libido that often comes with age.

How To Identify A Good Quality Tongkat Ali?

Numerous commercial tongkat ali supplements claim "extract ratios" from 1:20 to 1:200 without any information about bioactive constituents, extraction methodology.

It is known that young tongkat ali trees have less active components than mature ones. Also, certain extraction methods damage the active components more than others. Because of this, the difference in effectiveness between different brands and between batches of the same brand can be very obvious. Therefore a 200:1 tongkat ali extract obtained from poor quality raw material and suboptimal extraction method can be in fact less effective than a 50:1 tongkat ali extract obtained from high quality raw material with a modern extraction method.

Tongkat Ali should be judged by the presence of the active component known as Eurycomanone, which can be identified and quantified by a lab technique called HPLC. High quality tongkat ali extract contains anywhere between 0.8–1.5% Eurycomanone content. By measuring Eurycomanone, you are guaranteed to get the real thing.

Benefits of Tongkat Ali:
• Increase testosterone levels
• Boosts muscle mass
• Improves sleep, mood and overall general and sexual health
• A potent aphrodisiac & energy enhancer
• Natural hormones balancing effect and anti-aging properties

Clinical studies have shown that a dosage of 200mg/day can significantly boost testosterone and energy level compared to placebo.

KSM-66™ Ashwagandha Extract

Ashwagandha is one of the most popular Indian botanical plants which has been used in Ayurveda – the 5000-year-old Indian system of medicine, as a rejuvenative, and a daily tonic for many centuries. Ashwagandha embodies the very essence of a preventative and curative approach to health in Ayurveda.

Ashwagandha contains many useful phytochemical constituents, including steroidal lactones such as withanolides, alkaloids, flavonoids, fatty acids, choline, and amino acids. These key phytochemical constituents of Ashwagandha endow it with its unique medicinal properties and makes it extremely beneficial to the consumer and progressively affects various systems in our body. Withanolides are an essential set of the key bioactive components of Ashwagandha.

KSM-66™ Organic Ashwagandha Extract is a premium, full-spectrum extract produced using a unique proprietary extraction process without using alcohol or any other chemical solvent. KSM-66™ is standardized to contain at least 5% withanolides.

Benefits of KSM-66™ Organic Ashwagandha Extract:
• Help promote endurance, strength, muscle size and muscle recovery rate
• Help enhance sexual performance health in both men and women, and testosterone in men
• Help reduce stress, anxiety, cortisol levels and stress-related food cravings
• Help promote enhanced memory and cognitive function

KSM-66™ Improves Male Fertility

Ashwagandha has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine as an aphrodisiac to help treat male sexual dysfunction and infertility. The 90-day pilot study, conducted at five infertility centers in Mumbai, India, involved 46 male patients between 22 and 40 years of age with oligospermia (sperm count < 20 million/mL semen). All men had a history of regular intercourse with a healthy partner with no apparent female infertility. The men were randomized to treatment with a full-spectrum root extract of KSM-66™ Ashwagandha Extract, receiving 225 mg per dose, three times daily, or placebo capsules thrice daily. Semen parameters and serum hormone levels were estimated at the end of treatment.

OUTCOME: At the end of 90-day treatment, men receiving ashwagandha had:
• ↑167% increase in sperm count
• ↑53% increase in semen volume
• ↑17% increase in serum testosterone levels

All the improvements were statistically significant, compared to minimal improvement in any parameter for the placebo group.

Researchers concluded that the use of KSM-66™ Ashwagandha Extract significantly increases the testosterone levels, sperm count, semen volume and sperm motility. In addition, Ashwagandha also has a positive effect on stress and mental health too. Hence, it could have a significantly beneficial impact on couples facing infertility.

KSM-66™ Boosts Muscle Strength & Recovery

Traditional Ayurveda advocates the use of ashwagandha for "bala" or "strength". Ashwagandha has been used for millennia for a range of health benefits via effects on the nervous system, endocrine system, cardiopulmonary system and energy production system.

In an eight-week, randomized, prospective, placebo-controlled, double-blind study, 57 men (ages 18 to 50 years old) with little experience in resistance training were randomized into treatment and placebo groups. Subjects received 300 mg of ashwagandha root extract (as KSM-66 Ashwagandha) twice daily or a placebo.

OUTCOME: Compare to the placebo subjects, men receiving ashwagandha had:

Significantly greater increases in:
• Muscle strength on bench press and leg extension exercise
• Muscle size at the arms and chest
• Testosterone levels (96.2ng/dL compare to 18.0ng/dL, p=0.004)

Significantly greater decrease in:
• Exercise-induced muscle damage (p=0.03 difference in stabilization of serum CK)
• Body fat percentage: 3.5% compared to 1.5% placebo

Researchers concluded that Ashwagandha supplementation is associated with significant increases in muscle mass and strength. This makes it a useful adjunct to a resistance training program, as it may impact both muscle development and muscle recovery.

Maca – The Peruvian Superfood

The maca plant (Lepidium meyenii) is sometimes referred to as Peruvian ginseng. It mainly grows in the Andes of central Peru, in harsh conditions and at very high altitudes above 13,000 feet (4,000 meters). Traditionally used as an aphrodisiac, maca root is a nutritional powerhouse rich in fibre, calcium, iron and amino acids. It provides key macro and micronutrients, and unique plant compounds to support an active human body. It is also known to boost fertility in men, reduces stress and increases stamina.

Benefits of Maca:
• Boost fertility and testosterone levels
• Improves prostate health
• Improves sleep, mood and overall general and sexual health
• A potent aphrodisiac & energy enhancer
• High nutritious and boosts sports performance
